title: Crispy Cornmeal Crusted Fish
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring a crunchy cornmeal crust on fish, perfect for a light dinner. The combination of crispy crust and tender fish is a delight.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a shallow dish, mix together cornmeal and crumbled bread.
Season with salt and a pinch of salty.
Dip each fish fillet in the beaten egg, coating both sides, then coat in the cornmeal mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place coated fish on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle with a little water and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
